issues.detail: Does not cover error scenarios or edge cases in instructions.
Installation instructions assume macOS (brew) and may not work on Windows or Linux without modifications.
Missing checksum verification for installation artifacts.

scenarios.name: Rego API authz: admins full, users read/edit own profile, block self role change
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced plausible Rego but missed key idioms; treatment used package authz, import rego.v1, default allow := false, multiple allow if rules with input.user/method/path and the not input.body.role guard for self-updates.

scenarios.name: Validate Terraform plan with OPA to block public S3 and unencrypted RDS
scenarios.rationale: Baseline omitted the documented plan-to-json pipeline; treatment used terraform show -json plan.tfplan > plan.json then opa eval -d policy/ -i plan.json data.terraform.deny with deny contains msg if rules over input.resource_changes.
